subcodes.first_line: The Herald hath raised His call when the Lord of Creation appeared, yet the people remain in manifest drunkenness, seized by the wine of vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نادی المناد اذ اتی مالک الایجاد ولکن العباد فی سکر مبین قد اخذهم سکر الهوی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
